headline: Caterpillar CEO Joe Creed takes over added role as board chairman
summary: Joe Creed, a central Illinois native, now has an additional role at Caterpillar with Jim Umpleby's retirement.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Dive, Oil Prices Soar As Trump Vows To Hit Iran 'Hard'; Tesla Deliveries Due
summary: Futures fell and oil prices jumped as President Trump said the U.S. would continue to hit Iran "extremely hard" over the next 2-3 weeks.

headline: Caterpillar Faces Mexico Import Review As Supply Chain Risks Resurface
summary: U.S. senators are calling for a national security investigation into heavy equipment imports from Mexico. The review would focus on machinery and parts crossing the border, including products tied to Caterpillar’s manufacturing network. Possible outcomes include new tariffs or trade restrictions on equipment imported from Mexican facilities. Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT), which has built up manufacturing capacity in Mexico, could see its cross border supply chains come under scrutiny if the...

headline: U.S. Stock Futures Slide During Trump’s Address
summary: Futures tied to all three major indexes slid during President Trump’s remarks to the nation Wednesday night, chipping away at some of the strong gains of the past two days. Oil prices, which have moved counter to stocks lately, turned higher after notching losses during the earlier trading session.

headline: Barclays Updates Machinery Outlook, Boosts Caterpillar (CAT) Target
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 31, Barclays analyst Adam Seiden raised the firm’s price recommendation on Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) to $700 from $625. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm updated its targets across machinery and construction names as part […]
